---
title: "Case Closed Episode List"
author: "Derek Sollberger"
date: "2026-05-21"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---








::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
# Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
:::


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
	
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
	
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

:::

::::

::::: {.panel-tabset}



:::::
